name: GRANDES, Inc.
summary: GRANDES, Inc. engages in the construction and sale of real estate properties in Japan. The also company plans, develops, and provides investment condominiums, maisonette-type apartments for investment, and simple urban accommodations; and rents apartments and tenant buildings. In addition, it provides construction contracting; and construction and real estate consulting services. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Oita, Japan.
